heading: Depositing appropriations in fund
label: 499s Depositing appropriations in fund
text: Any unexpended balances of appropriations for the current fiscal year, and any subsequent appropriations, made to carry out the Acts referred to in , may be deposited in the Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act fund.section 499c(b) of this title
notes: References in TextThe Acts referred to in , referred to in text, mean the Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act, 1930, which was translated to read “this chapter” and the Act to prevent the destruction or dumping of farm produce, , , which is classified to chapter 20 (§ 491 et seq.) of this title.section 499c(b) of this titleact Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 30944 Stat. 1355
